title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.325 - Submission of applications
text:
197.325.  Submission of applications. — Any person who proposes to develop or offer a new institutional health service shall submit a letter of intent to the committee at least thirty days prior to the filing of the application.
(L. 1979 H.B. 222 § 6, A.L. 1999 S.B. 326) 
Effective 7-1-99
